text.title: Tool-Tier Approval Gate Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule id from content/01-core-rules.xml for inc-tool-tier-approval-gate.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the agent have multiple tools with varying blast radius?

example.trace: Agent requests `cluster-drain` (T3) → runtime requires two-person + cooling → operator A approves → cooling 5min → operator B approves → execute → audit entry written.
